pageContext.name: The Dark Duel
pageContext.description: Sideshow and ACME Archives are thrilled to present The Dark Duel Fine Art Lithograph!  This Star Wars: The Clone Wars-inspired artwork by Laz Marquez features Darth Maul and Ahsoka Tano in a stunning presentation of the duality of the Force.  Limited to 350 pieces, this lithograph is hand-numbered and comes with a certificate of authenticity. A truly beautiful addition to any gallery, this Star Wars art is a must-have for fans of The Clone Wars!
